steps.title: Match variables to work types
steps.content: The problem says $x$ is the number of consultation hours and $y$ is the number of hours spent drafting garden plans.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content:
In $72x+94y=1{,}472$, the term $72x$ represents dollars earned from $x$ consultation hours. Therefore, $72$ is the hourly rate for consultations.
The answer is A.
